name: ExtensionIngredient_Role
title: R5: Purpose of the ingredient within the product, e.g. active, inactive (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Ingredient.role` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Ingredient.role` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Ingredient.role` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Ingredient.role` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Ingredient` is not mapped.
Element `Ingredient.role` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Purpose of the ingredient within the product, e.g. active, inactive (new)
element.comment:
Element `Ingredient.role` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Ingredient` is not mapped.
Element `Ingredient.role` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Purpose of the ingredient within the product, e.g. active, inactive
element.definition: A classification of the ingredient identifying its purpose within the product, e.g. active, inactive.

binding.description: A classification of the ingredient identifying its purpose within the product, e.g. active, inactive.
